summary: Completed testing of Orders GST Type and Revenue Calculation features. All backend API tests pass (11/11). Frontend UI verified with GST Type dropdown in modal and GST Type column in table.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing school payments data
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST Type feature fully implemented and tested. Orders page shows GST Type column with colored badges (Book GST=blue, Inclusive=green, Exclusive=orange). Update Payment modal has GST Type dropdown with 4 options. Revenue calculation in /api/admin/reports/overview correctly sums conversion_amount and onboarding_data.total_amount for converted/active/renewed schools.

orders_gst_type_dropdown.details: GST Type dropdown in Update Payment modal with options: Select GST Type (empty), Book GST (book_gst), Inclusive GST (inclusive), Exclusive GST (exclusive)

orders_gst_type_column.details: GST Type column displayed in Orders table with colored badges - blue for Book GST, green for Inclusive, orange for Exclusive

patch_orders_gst_type.details: PATCH /api/orders/{payment_id} accepts and saves gst_type field. Tested all 3 values: book_gst, inclusive, exclusive

get_school_payments_gst_type.details: GET /api/orders/school-payments returns gst_type field in response

revenue_calculation.details: Revenue calculation in /api/admin/reports/overview correctly includes conversion_amount and onboarding_data.total_amount for converted/active/renewed schools. Total Revenue shown: ₹297,100

test_execution_details.test_type: Backend API Testing + Frontend UI Testing

notes.email_templates: Beautiful welcome and invoice email templates are code-complete but require Resend domain verification to work in production (MOCKED - emails won't actually send without domain verification)
notes.gst_type_values: Valid values are: book_gst, inclusive, exclusive
